input_list.name: i_decode_done
input_list.comment: Signal to indicate that the command decoding is done and the next command can be issued

input_list.name: i_once_start
input_list.comment: Signal to indicate the start of a new control transaction, only valid for the first transaction

input_list.name: i_is_jump
input_list.comment: Signal to indicate whether the current command is a jump command

output_list.name: o_cmd_start
output_list.comment: Signal to indicate the start of a new control transaction (asserted for one clock cycle at the start of each transaction)

output_list.name: o_cmd_addr_valid
output_list.comment: Signal to indicate that the command address output is valid
